ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aed_models" (
  "aed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AED model */,
  "make_model" TEXT /* Make and model of the AED */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the AED in inches */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the AED in inches */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the AED in inches */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the AED in cubic inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the AED in pounds */,
  "battery_life" TEXT /* Battery life of the AED */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AED */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aed_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aed_model_categories" (
  "aed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AED model */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aed_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "aed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AED model in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of this model available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (warehouse or store) */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_aed_id FOREIGN KEY ("aed_id") REFERENCES aed_models ("aed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "aed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AED model */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance check */,
  "standards_met" TEXT /* Standards met by the AED model */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_aed_id FOREIGN KEY ("aed_id") REFERENCES aed_models ("aed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "aed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AED model serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_aed_id FOREIGN KEY ("aed_id") REFERENCES aed_models ("aed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "aed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AED model */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period in years */,
  "warranty_details" TEXT /* Details of the warranty coverage */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranties_aed_id FOREIGN KEY ("aed_id") REFERENCES aed_models ("aed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "aed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AED model ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of AEDs ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_aed_id FOREIGN KEY ("aed_id") REFERENCES aed_models ("aed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
